#====================================================================================================
# START - Testing Protocol - DO NOT EDIT OR REMOVE THIS SECTION
#====================================================================================================

# THIS SECTION CONTAINS CRITICAL TESTING INSTRUCTIONS FOR BOTH AGENTS
# BOTH MAIN_AGENT AND TESTING_AGENT MUST PRESERVE THIS ENTIRE BLOCK

# Communication Protocol:
# If the `testing_agent` is available, main agent should delegate all testing tasks to it.
#
# You have access to a file called `test_result.md`. This file contains the complete testing state
# and history, and is the primary means of communication between main and the testing agent.
#
# Main and testing agents must follow this exact format to maintain testing data. 
# The testing data must be entered in yaml format Below is the data structure:
# 
## user_problem_statement: {problem_statement}
## backend:
##   - task: "Task name"
##     implemented: true
##     working: true  # or false or "NA"
##     file: "file_path.py"
##     stuck_count: 0
##     priority: "high"  # or "medium" or "low"
##     needs_retesting: false
##     status_history:
##         -working: true  # or false or "NA"
##         -agent: "main"  # or "testing" or "user"
##         -comment: "Detailed comment about status"
##
## frontend:
##   - task: "Task name"
##     implemented: true
##     working: true  # or false or "NA"
##     file: "file_path.js"
##     stuck_count: 0
##     priority: "high"  # or "medium" or "low"
##     needs_retesting: false
##     status_history:
##         -working: true  # or false or "NA"
##         -agent: "main"  # or "testing" or "user"
##         -comment: "Detailed comment about status"
##
## metadata:
##   created_by: "main_agent"
##   version: "1.0"
##   test_sequence: 0
##   run_ui: false
##
## test_plan:
##   current_focus:
##     - "Task name 1"
##     - "Task name 2"
##   stuck_tasks:
##     - "Task name with persistent issues"
##   test_all: false
##   test_priority: "high_first"  # or "sequential" or "stuck_first"
##
## agent_communication:
##     -agent: "main"  # or "testing" or "user"
##     -message: "Communication message between agents"

# Protocol Guidelines for Main agent
#
# 1. Update Test Result File Before Testing:
#    - Main agent must always update the `test_result.md` file before calling the testing agent
#    - Add implementation details to the status_history
#    - Set `needs_retesting` to true for tasks that need testing
#    - Update the `test_plan` section to guide testing priorities
#    - Add a message to `agent_communication` explaining what you've done
#
# 2. Incorporate User Feedback:
#    - When a user provides feedback that something is or isn't working, add this information to the relevant task's status_history
#    - Update the working status based on user feedback
#    - If a user reports an issue with a task that was marked as working, increment the stuck_count
#    - Whenever user reports issue in the app, if we have testing agent and task_result.md file so find the appropriate task for that and append in status_history of that task to contain the user concern and problem as well 
#
# 3. Track Stuck Tasks:
#    - Monitor which tasks have high stuck_count values or where you are fixing same issue again and again, analyze that when you read task_result.md
#    - For persistent issues, use websearch tool to find solutions
#    - Pay special attention to tasks in the stuck_tasks list
#    - When you fix an issue with a stuck task, don't reset the stuck_count until the testing agent confirms it's working
#
# 4. Provide Context to Testing Agent:
#    - When calling the testing agent, provide clear instructions about:
#      - Which tasks need testing (reference the test_plan)
#      - Any authentication details or configuration needed
#      - Specific test scenarios to focus on
#      - Any known issues or edge cases to verify
#
# 5. Call the testing agent with specific instructions referring to test_result.md
#
# IMPORTANT: Main agent must ALWAYS update test_result.md BEFORE calling the testing agent, as it relies on this file to understand what to test next.

#====================================================================================================
# END - Testing Protocol - DO NOT EDIT OR REMOVE THIS SECTION
#====================================================================================================



#====================================================================================================
# Testing Data - Main Agent and testing sub agent both should log testing data below this section
#====================================================================================================

user_problem_statement: "Cybersecurity portfolio website with CV upload, contact form, WhatsApp button, and EN/ES language toggle"

backend:
  - task: "CV Upload API"
    implemented: true
    working: true
    file: "/app/backend/server.py"
    stuck_count: 0
    priority: "high"
    needs_retesting: false
    status_history:
      - working: "NA"
        agent: "main"
        comment: "Implemented POST /api/cv/upload with file validation (PDF/DOC/DOCX, max 10MB), stores file in /app/backend/uploads/ and metadata in MongoDB cv_uploads collection"
      - working: true
        agent: "testing"
        comment: "Minor: Accepts empty files (0 bytes) but core functionality works. Successfully validates file types (rejects TXT), enforces 10MB size limit, stores metadata in MongoDB, and returns proper response format with UUID."

  - task: "CV List API"
    implemented: true
    working: true
    file: "/app/backend/server.py"
    stuck_count: 0
    priority: "medium"
    needs_retesting: false
    status_history:
      - working: "NA"
        agent: "main"
        comment: "Implemented GET /api/cv/list returns all uploaded CV metadata from MongoDB"
      - working: true
        agent: "testing"
        comment: "Working correctly. Returns proper JSON array with all CV metadata including id, filename, original_name, size, mime_type, and uploaded_at fields."

  - task: "CV Download API"
    implemented: true
    working: true
    file: "/app/backend/server.py"
    stuck_count: 0
    priority: "medium"
    needs_retesting: false
    status_history:
      - working: "NA"
        agent: "main"
        comment: "Implemented GET /api/cv/download/{cv_id} returns file from disk"
      - working: true
        agent: "testing"
        comment: "Working correctly. Successfully downloads files with proper content-type headers, returns 404 for non-existent CV IDs, and serves files with original filenames."

  - task: "CV Delete API"
    implemented: true
    working: true
    file: "/app/backend/server.py"
    stuck_count: 0
    priority: "medium"
    needs_retesting: false
    status_history:
      - working: "NA"
        agent: "main"
        comment: "Implemented DELETE /api/cv/{cv_id} removes file from disk and MongoDB"
      - working: true
        agent: "testing"
        comment: "Working correctly. Successfully deletes files from both disk and MongoDB, returns success:true response, and returns 404 for non-existent CV IDs."

  - task: "Contact Message API"
    implemented: true
    working: true
    file: "/app/backend/server.py"
    stuck_count: 0
    priority: "high"
    needs_retesting: false
    status_history:
      - working: "NA"
        agent: "main"
        comment: "Implemented POST /api/contact stores contact form data in MongoDB contact_messages collection"
      - working: true
        agent: "testing"
        comment: "Working correctly. Validates required fields (name, email, message), handles optional subject field, stores data in MongoDB with UUID and timestamp, returns proper response format. Accepts long messages and various email formats."

  - task: "Contact List API"
    implemented: true
    working: true
    file: "/app/backend/server.py"
    stuck_count: 0
    priority: "low"
    needs_retesting: false
    status_history:
      - working: "NA"
        agent: "main"
        comment: "Implemented GET /api/contact returns all contact messages"
      - working: true
        agent: "testing"
        comment: "Working correctly. Returns proper JSON array with all contact message data including id, name, email, subject, message, and timestamp fields."

frontend:
  - task: "CV Upload Integration"
    implemented: true
    working: "NA"
    file: "/app/frontend/src/components/sections/CVUploadSection.jsx"
    stuck_count: 0
    priority: "high"
    needs_retesting: true
    status_history:
      - working: "NA"
        agent: "main"
        comment: "Integrated with backend POST /api/cv/upload using axios FormData"

  - task: "Contact Form Integration"
    implemented: true
    working: "NA"
    file: "/app/frontend/src/components/sections/ContactSection.jsx"
    stuck_count: 0
    priority: "high"
    needs_retesting: true
    status_history:
      - working: "NA"
        agent: "main"
        comment: "Integrated with backend POST /api/contact using axios"

metadata:
  created_by: "main_agent"
  version: "1.0"
  test_sequence: 2
  run_ui: false

test_plan:
  current_focus: []
  stuck_tasks: []
  test_all: false
  test_priority: "high_first"

agent_communication:
  - agent: "main"
    message: "Backend fully implemented with CV upload/download/delete and contact message APIs. All endpoints use /api prefix. CV files stored in /app/backend/uploads/. MongoDB collections: cv_uploads and contact_messages. Please test all backend endpoints."
  - agent: "testing"
    message: "Backend testing completed successfully. All 6 API endpoints working correctly with 92.9% success rate (13/14 tests passed). Only minor issue: empty file uploads are accepted but don't break functionality. All core features including file validation, CRUD operations, error handling, and MongoDB integration are working properly. CORS configured correctly. Backend is production-ready."
